mapper.select: SELECT id, source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_each_mapping WHERE source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_each_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_note_each_mapping (source_note_id, target_note_id, parsed_note_name, anchor, nickname, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{mapping.sourceNoteId}, #{mapping.targetNoteId}, #{mapping.parsedNoteName}, #{mapping.anchor}, #{mapping.nickname}, #{mapping.isPass}, #{mapping.isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET target_note_id = #{targetNoteId}, is_pass = #{isPass}, update_time = NOW() WHERE source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND parsed_note_name = #{parsedNoteName} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET target_note_id = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_each_mapping SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_note_each_mapping WHERE source_note_id = #{noteId} AND target_note_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.source_note_id AS sourceNoteId, n.title AS sourceNoteTitle, m.parsed_note_name AS parsedNoteName, m.anchor AS anchor, m.nickname AS nickname,
CASE WHEN n.user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isCrossUser,
0 AS isCrossUser,
n.status AS sourceNoteStatus, m.create_time AS createTime FROM biz_note_each_mapping m INNER JOIN biz_note n ON n.id = m.source_note_id WHERE m.target_note_id = #{targetNoteId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 # 映射行有效 AND n.status != 8 # 笔记不为删除
AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR n.status = 6) # 笔记属于作者 / 笔记处于公开状态
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT m.target_note_id AS targetNoteId, target.title AS targetNoteTitle, m.parsed_note_name AS parsedNoteName, m.anchor AS anchor, m.nickname AS nickname, 0 AS isMissing FROM biz_note_each_mapping m INNER JOIN biz_note source ON source.id = m.source_note_id INNER JOIN biz_note target ON target.id = m.target_note_id WHERE m.source_note_id = #{sourceNoteId} AND m.target_note_id IS NOT NULL AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.is_pass = 1 AND source.status = 6 AND target.status = 6 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
